name: Spadhausen
notes:
Our company was founded in 2008, and it is operating as ISP since 2011. We offer wireless (FWA) and optical fiber (FTTH) internet access through our proprietary network in our region, we also have nationwide coverage through wholesale agreements.

Peering policy:
We always peer with the route servers at the IXP.  
You need to have your peeringDB info updated.
We generally NOT peer if you are already on the route server. 
In case a direct peering is preferred we can discuss it.

AS62166 infrastructure is fully compliant with MANRS security indications.
